Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are some manga mixed in among the[n]textbooks and other scholarly literature...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Maybe I should put some of my own manga there after I finish 'em.[n]{f 1 1}
